warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees (landscape scan of 2 pages of the ปร.4 BOQ book). Source must be rotated 90 degrees COUNTER-CLOCKWISE to read normally; after that rotation, the physical RIGHT half of the original landscape image becomes the TOP block (this sheet, 1/19) and the LEFT half becomes the BOTTOM block (sheet 2/19, extracted separately as _2.json).

This is the pile-foundation (ฐานรากเสาเข็ม) BOQ variant for this house, distinct from a spread-footing variant that may exist elsewhere in the drawing set - confirmed by the 'เสาเข็มคสล.หกเหลี่ยมกลวง' (hollow hexagonal concrete pile) line item appearing under หมวดงานโครงสร้าง on sheet 2/19.

All quantity/price cells on this cover sheet are blank in the original document - only category labels and the 'รวม' unit placeholder are printed, matching the pattern seen on house 01's equivalent cover sheet.

doc_page=57 inferred from the printed page-number corner crop '57' visible on the source PNG (bottom-left after rotation) using the linear relationship doc_page = png_page - 2, the same relationship confirmed for house 01's BOQ book.
